diagrams.title: Kruskal's Algorithm Flowchart
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing the step-by-step process of Kruskal's Algorithm from sorting edges to finding MST
elements: If yes: Add edge to MST, Union(u,v)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the greedy edge selection process and decision making using Union-Find

diagrams.title: Union-Find Structure Evolution
diagrams.description: Shows how Union-Find trees evolve during Kruskal's execution on a sample graph
elements: After adding B-C: Tree with B-C
After adding A-D: Tree with A-D
After adding A-C (union of components): Larger tree with A-D-C-B
After adding C-E: Single tree with all vertices A-B-C-D-E
diagrams.purpose: Understand how Union-Find tracks connected components as edges are added

diagrams.title: Kruskal vs Prim Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of how Kruskal's and Prim's algorithms grow the MST
elements: Kruskal: Start with V isolated vertices, add edges connecting different components
Prim: Start with one vertex, grow tree by adding minimum edge from tree to non-tree vertex
Both converge to MST of same total weight
diagrams.purpose: Differentiate between two greedy MST algorithms and their strategies
